requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Antigua and Barbuda is a 50 Hz, UK/IEC-legacy Caribbean market rather than a North American J1772-first market. For new interoperable EVSE deployments, the practical direction is IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2 for DC fast charging, aligned with IEC 61851 and IEC 62196 equipment families. Connector choice should be confirmed against the importer, APUA/site-owner requirements, fleet vehicles, and any tender specification, but China GB/T-only outlets should not be assumed to fit vehicles or infrastructure in this market.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达是50 Hz、英制/IEC传统加勒比市场，并非以北美J1772为首选的市场。对于新的互操作EVSE部署，实务方向是交流采用IEC 62196 Type 2、直流快充采用CCS2，并与IEC 61851及IEC 62196设备体系一致。接口选择应根据进口商、APUA/场地方要求、车队车辆及招标规范确认，但不应假定仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩可适配该市场车辆或基础设施。
summary.zht: 安地卡及巴布達是50 Hz、英制/IEC傳統加勒比市場，並非以北美J1772為首選的市場。對於新的互操作EVSE部署，實務方向是交流採用IEC 62196 Type 2、直流快充採用CCS2，並與IEC 61851及IEC 62196設備體系一致。接口選擇應根據進口商、APUA/場地方要求、車隊車輛及招標規範確認，但不應假定僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁可適配該市場車輛或基礎設施。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3 — CCS2 / Combo 2 DC vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Project, fleet, hotel, tourism-site, or APUA/site-owner connector specifications

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 communication. GB/T AC couplers are not interchangeable with IEC 62196 Type 2 due to connector gender, signaling, and contact arrangement differences. GB/T DC couplers are geometrically and electronically incompatible with CCS2, including the DC communication stack.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配套GB/T 27930通信。GB/T交流接口因接口性别、信号和触点排列差异，不能与IEC 62196 Type 2互换。GB/T直流接口在几何结构和电子通信方面均与CCS2不兼容，包括直流通信栈。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配套GB/T 27930通訊。GB/T交流接口因接口性別、信號和觸點排列差異，不能與IEC 62196 Type 2互換。GB/T直流接口在幾何結構和電子通訊方面均與CCS2不兼容，包括直流通訊棧。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — DC charger to BMS communication

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for IEC Type 2 / CCS2 deployments in Antigua and Barbuda. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack, labels, temperature-rise evidence, and service spares. Adapters should not be used as a substitute for a project-compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于安提瓜和巴布达IEC Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈、标签、温升证据及服务备件进行硬件重新设计。转接器不应作为项目合规接口设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於安地卡及巴布達IEC Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧、標籤、溫升證據及服務備件進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不應作為項目合規接口設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by project, fleet, site-owner, importer, or utility-facing specification; GB/T physical incompatibility prevents direct substitution
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat connector conversion as a hardware and protocol redesign. Antigua and Barbuda should be approached as an IEC Type 2 / CCS2 direction market, not as a J1772 or China GB/T plug-in match, unless a specific project specification states otherwise.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将接口转换视为硬件和协议重新设计。除非具体项目规范另有说明，安提瓜和巴布达应按IEC Type 2 / CCS2方向市场处理，而不是按J1772或中国GB/T直接插接匹配处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將接口轉換視為硬體和協議重新設計。除非具體項目規範另有說明，安地卡及巴布達應按IEC Type 2 / CCS2方向市場處理，而不是按J1772或中國GB/T直接插接匹配處理。
